"Roller skates, you say? For climbing the mountain? Well, I suppose I can make you a pair, but don't say I didn't warn you."

She rummages through her toolbox, pulls out some wire, a few screws, and what looks like a bicycle helmet. After a few minutes of tinkering, she hands you a pair of roller skates that look like they were made by a kindergartener having a temper tantrum. You put them on, and they seem to fit... sort of.

As you start to make your way up the mountain, you quickly realize that roller skates are not the best idea for climbing. You tumble, you fall, you crash into rocks. It's a miracle you don't break any bones.
